chapter_title: About the Superiority of i'etekaf in the

hadith_entries.text:
694. Narrated Abdullah ibn Omar
'Allah's
Messenger used to practice i'etekaf in the last ten days
of the month of Ramadhan.' (Bukhari)
31 i'etekaf is to confine oneself in a mosque to perform prayers,
reciting the Koran, and invocations. During Al i'etekaf, one
leaves worldly activities for a temporary period, and a Muslim
should practice it. It is sufficient to stay in the mosque for a very
short time with a sincere intention, and it is recommended to
practice it in the month of Ramadhan.
Riyadhos-Saliheen (The Meadows of the Righteous)

695. Narrated A'isha, the wife of the Prophet : 'The
Prophet used to practice i'etekaf in the last ten days
of Ramadhan until he died and then his wives used to
practice i'etekaf after him.' (Bukhari)
Riyadhos-Saliheen (The Meadows of the Righteous)
(١٠) كتاب الحج
Book of Hajj
٢١ - باب فضل الحج
Allah said:
